fields.AutoUpdateUser: which user should be updating this component's logic. Defaults to active user if not filled.
fields.OutOfSightAngle: disables the function of this component if the updating user is looking more than this many degrees away from this component's slot.
fields.MaxTouchPenetrationDistance: How far it can go into the touchable's collider before its not considered as touching.
fields.Offset: The offset of where the tip touch sources touch effects start from the slot this component is on.
fields.Direction: The direction in which to interact with touchable elements using this component.
fields.MaxDistance: the maximum distance before hovering doesn't register
